asset_name: TB-500 Fragment Identity and Detection Evidence
status: PRIMARY ANALYTICAL IDENTITIES CONFIRMED — FULL METHODS EXTRACTION OPEN
domain: Ac-LKKTETQ identity, synthesis and anti-doping detection
extracted_summary: Primary analytical publications identify TB-500 as the N-terminally acetylated 17–23 fragment associated with thymosin beta-4.
Analytical detection work exists in equine biological matrices.
This supports identity and doping-control relevance, not therapeutic efficacy.
limitations: Equine detection is not human clinical efficacy evidence.
Commercial products require sequence and impurity verification.
permitted_claims: TB-500 is an identity-distinct acetylated heptapeptide fragment with analytical doping-control literature.
prohibited_claims: Transfer of full-length thymosin beta-4 trials to TB-500.
Claims that detection research proves efficacy or safety.
